summary: Completed comprehensive testing of delete functionality for invoices, contracts, and audit runs. All DELETE endpoints work correctly (404 for non-existent, 200 for valid IDs with proper cleanup). Frontend UI shows trash icons in all tables, confirmation dialogs open/close properly, and deletions remove items from lists. Existing functionality (navigation, uploads, dashboard) remains intact.

design_issues.issue: Minor React hydration warnings about HTML structure (span inside tbody) in console - not affecting functionality

passed_tests: DELETE /api/invoices/{id} returns 200 and removes invoice + AWB data for valid ID
DELETE /api/contracts/{id} returns 200 and removes contract + rate cards for valid ID
DELETE /api/audit/runs/{id} returns 404 for non-existent audit run
DELETE /api/audit/runs/{id} returns 200 and removes audit run + results + unmarks invoice as audited
Invoices page shows trash icons in actions column for each row
Clicking trash icon on invoice opens confirmation dialog with invoice filename
Confirming delete removes invoice from list (count: 13→12)
Canceling delete keeps invoice in list
Contracts page shows trash icons in actions column for each row
Clicking trash icon on contract opens confirmation dialog
Audit Engine page shows trash icons in audit run rows
Clicking trash icon on audit run opens confirmation dialog with re-auditing warning
Audit run deletion removes item from list (count: 4→3)
All existing endpoints still work: GET /api/dashboard/stats, GET /api/invoices, GET /api/contracts, GET /api/audit/runs
Order Data page (manual upload) still loads correctly
